summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FAST identity verification app. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend UI fully functional with text paste, file upload, verification, results display, export, and clear features all working properly.
passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns healthy status with all 5 platforms
Backend /api/verify endpoint processes multiple identifiers correctly
Backend /api/verify/file endpoint handles CSV file upload successfully
Backend error handling for invalid requests (empty data, wrong file types)
Frontend loads with FAST branding and blue/purple theme
Text paste zone accepts input and detects identifiers correctly
Verify button triggers verification and displays progress indicator
Results display in masonry grid with all 5 platform statuses
File upload zone accepts CSV files and processes them
Export CSV functionality generates and downloads results file
Clear/Effacer buttons work correctly and restore empty state
Stats bar shows correct counts for total/found/not found
Mock verification provides consistent hash-based results
